'''âzh-f-k''' ('''kazhafak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impawn|impawn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impawn|impawn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| kazhafak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhafak|thizhafak]] || [[word:jizhafak|jizhafak]] || [[word:shizhafak|shizhafak]] || [[word:kizhafak|kizhafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhafak|thuthuzhafak]] || [[word:jujuzhafak|jujuzhafak]] || [[word:shushuzhafak|shushuzhafak]] || [[word:kukuzhafak|kukuzhafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhafak|thuzhafak]] || [[word:juzhafak|juzhafak]] || [[word:shuzhafak|shuzhafak]] || [[word:kuzhafak|kuzhafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhafak|thuzhafak]] || [[word:juzhafak|juzhafak]] || [[word:shuzhafak|shuzhafak]] || [[word:kuzhafak|kuzhafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhafak|thezhafak]] || [[word:jezhafak|jezhafak]] || [[word:shezhafak|shezhafak]] || [[word:kezhafak|kezhafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhafak|thothozhafak]] || [[word:jojozhafak|jojozhafak]] || [[word:shoshozhafak|shoshozhafak]] || [[word:kokozhafak|kokozhafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhafak|thozhafak]] || [[word:jozhafak|jozhafak]] || [[word:shozhafak|shozhafak]] || [[word:kozhafak|kozhafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhafak|thozhafak]] || [[word:jozhafak|jozhafak]] || [[word:shozhafak|shozhafak]] || [[word:kozhafak|kozhafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhafak|thĂŠzhafak]] || [[word:jĂŠzhafak|jĂŠzhafak]] || [[word:shĂŠzhafak|shĂŠzhafak]] || [[word:kĂŠzhafak|kĂŠzhafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhafak|thathazhafak]] || [[word:jajazhafak|jajazhafak]] || [[word:shashazhafak|shashazhafak]] || [[word:kakazhafak|kakazhafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhafak|thazhafak]] || [[word:jazhafak|jazhafak]] || [[word:shazhafak|shazhafak]] || [[word:kazhafak|kazhafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhafak|thazhafak]] || [[word:jazhafak|jazhafak]] || [[word:shazhafak|shazhafak]] || [[word:kazhafak|kazhafak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhafak|shazhafak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhafak|goshazhafak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhafak|gokishazhafak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhafaknĂŒ|shazhafaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaknknĂŒ|goshazhafaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafaknĂŒ|gokishazhafaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhafakshĂ«|shazhafakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkshĂ«|goshazhafaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhafakshĂ«|gokishazhafakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafakro|shazhafakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkro|goshazhafaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafakro|gokishazhafakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafakmu|shazhafakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkmu|goshazhafaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafakmu|gokishazhafakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhafaksher|shazhafaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhafaknksher|goshazhafaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhafaksher|gokishazhafaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhafakng|shazhafakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkng|goshazhafaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhafakng|gokishazhafakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhafakya|shazhafakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkya|goshazhafaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhafakya|gokishazhafakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhafakyam|shazhafakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkyam|goshazhafaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhafakyam|gokishazhafakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhafaknĂŒshĂ«|shazhafaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhafaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhafaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhafaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhafaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafaknĂŒro|shazhafaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaknknĂŒro|goshazhafaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafaknĂŒro|gokishazhafaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafaknĂŒmu|shazhafaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaknknĂŒmu|goshazhafaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafaknĂŒmu|gokishazhafaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhafakshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhafakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhafaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhafakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafakshĂ«ro|shazhafakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkshĂ«ro|goshazhafaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafakshĂ«ro|gokishazhafakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafakshĂ«mu|shazhafakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkshĂ«mu|goshazhafaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafakshĂ«mu|gokishazhafakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhafakronĂŒ|shazhafakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkronĂŒ|goshazhafaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafakronĂŒ|gokishazhafakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhafakroshĂ«|shazhafakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkroshĂ«|goshazhafaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhafakroshĂ«|gokishazhafakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafakromu|shazhafakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkromu|goshazhafaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafakromu|gokishazhafakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhafakmunĂŒ|shazhafakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkmunĂŒ|goshazhafaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafakmunĂŒ|gokishazhafakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhafakmushĂ«|shazhafakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkmushĂ«|goshazhafaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhafakmushĂ«|gokishazhafakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafakmuro|shazhafakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaknkmuro|goshazhafaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafakmuro|gokishazhafakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
